HomePage.title: Couple Memory
HomePage.subtitle: A photographer-inspired memory space for couples

LoginPage.title: Welcome back
LoginPage.subtitle: Continue organizing your albums, milestones, and the everyday moments you share.
LoginPage.trustLineOne: Photo timelines, anniversaries, and shared wish lists all continue with the same velvet plum language.
LoginPage.trustLineTwo: This is not a one-off landing page. It is a private space built to hold your shared memories over time.
LoginPage.trustCompact: Your photos, milestones, and shared moments stay here.

AuthLayout.brandTitle: Hold on to the moments that matter.
AuthLayout.brandCopy: Keep your photos, milestones, and shared everyday moments in one space made just for the two of you.

RegisterPage.title: Create account
RegisterPage.subtitle: Start capturing your story together
RegisterPage.name: Display name
RegisterPage.errorPasswordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
RegisterPage.errorAutoLoginFailed: Account created, but auto sign-in failed. Please log in manually.

DashboardPage.emptyTitle: You haven't created a space yet
DashboardPage.emptySubtitle: Create a couple space and start preserving your story
DashboardPage.summaryWithStartDate: Starting from {date}, this space keeps your photos, chapters, and public entry point organized in one place.
DashboardPage.summaryWithoutStartDate: This space keeps your photos, chapters, and public entry point organized in one place.
DashboardPage.publicLinkPublishedHint: This space is already public, so you can share the entry point directly with visitors.
DashboardPage.publicLinkPrivateHint: The public entry is still disabled. Once enabled, a shareable private link will appear here.
DashboardPage.reviewSubtitle: Turn yearly and anniversary milestones into something easier to revisit and share.
DashboardPage.reviewGenerateHint: No finished review is available yet. Generate a yearly or anniversary review first.
DashboardPage.curationSuggestionCount: {count} suggestions are still available to improve the album structure.
DashboardPage.curationStableHint: The current curation state is stable, so you can keep adding new memories.

PipelinePage.title: Pipeline run history
PipelinePage.subtitle: Inspect the status and node results for each photo processing run
PipelinePage.selectRun: Select a run to inspect its details

AlbumsPage.title: Albums
AlbumsPage.empty: No albums yet. Create one to get started.
AlbumsPage.deleteConfirm: Delete this album? Photos inside it will also be removed.

TimelinePage.title: Timeline
TimelinePage.readingNarrativeWithLocationAndPhoto: This memory marker is tied to {location} and already linked to a specific photo.
TimelinePage.readingNarrativeWithLocation: This memory marker is tied to {location}.
TimelinePage.readingNarrativeWithPhoto: This memory marker was drafted early from a linked photo.
TimelinePage.readingNarrativeGeneric: This is a milestone worth keeping on the timeline.
TimelinePage.recommendationReasonWithLocationAndPhoto: This suggestion includes both a location and a photo, which makes it a strong memory anchor to review.
TimelinePage.recommendationReasonWithLocation: This suggestion captures the location "{location}", which can help you decide whether it deserves a place on the timeline.
TimelinePage.recommendationReasonWithPhoto: This suggestion is already linked to a specific photo, so you can quickly judge whether it belongs on the timeline.
TimelinePage.recommendationReasonGeneric: This suggestion surfaced a potentially important moment early, so you can quickly decide whether it should stay on the timeline.
TimelinePage.mergeSuggestionHint: There are milestones around {location} only {days} day(s) apart. Consider whether they should be merged into one stronger timeline entry.
TimelinePage.pendingReview: {count} AI milestone suggestion(s) still need review
TimelinePage.narrativeGroupDescriptionMultiLocation: These confirmed milestones span {locationCount} places in time order.
TimelinePage.narrativeGroupDescriptionMany: These {itemCount} confirmed milestones are grouped in time order.
TimelinePage.narrativeGroupDescriptionSingle: Only one confirmed milestone is in this group.
TimelinePage.fieldDescriptionPlaceholder: Capture what made this moment special...

AlbumDetailPage.photoActionSetCoverConfirm: Set this photo as the current album cover?
AlbumDetailPage.narrativeDescription: Organize chapters first, then add summaries and an album description so this album reads more like a complete story.

AlbumDetailPage.narrativeReadyHint: This album is already starting to form a readable narrative.
AlbumDetailPage.narrativeNeedDescriptionHint: Add a short album description so this phase of your memory is easier to understand.
AlbumDetailPage.narrativeNeedOrganizationHint: You can keep organizing loose photos into chapters to make the album feel more like a story.
AlbumDetailPage.narrativeSaveFailed: Failed to save the album details. Please try again later.
AlbumDetailPage.narrativeSaveSuccess: The album details have been updated.
AlbumDetailPage.saveOrderFailed: Failed to save the photo order. Please try again later.
AlbumDetailPage.empty: No photos yet. Upload some to get started.
AlbumDetailPage.chapterSectionDescription: Group related photos from this phase into a story.
AlbumDetailPage.ungroupedSectionDescription: These photos are not in a chapter yet, and can still be kept on their own first.
AlbumDetailPage.ungroupedEmpty: The loose moments from this phase have all been organized.
AlbumDetailPage.chapterEmptyDescription: Start with a few related photos and turn them into a memory.
AlbumDetailPage.chapterEmptyAction: Select photos to create a chapter
AlbumDetailPage.composerDescription: Name this memory first, then decide whether to add a short background note.
AlbumDetailPage.moveDialogDescription: Choose a target chapter. The selected photos will leave their current chapter and move into the new one.
AlbumDetailPage.workspaceEmptyTitle: Pick something from the album to begin

AlbumDetailPage.workspacePhotoDescription: Review and edit this photo here without losing your place in the album.
AlbumDetailPage.workspaceChapterDescription: Adjust the chapter title and background note here without interrupting album browsing.
AlbumDetailPage.detailDrawerDescription: Adjust the title and background note for this memory.

PhotoUploader.dropzoneTitle: Click or drag photos here to upload

SettingsPage.title: Space settings
SettingsPage.profileHint: Keep avatar and nickname in one profile section, and only show upload controls when the user wants to replace the avatar.
SettingsPage.avatarCollapsedHint: Your current avatar will appear in your profile.
SettingsPage.avatarReplaceHint: Choose a new avatar image and it will be applied as soon as the upload completes.
SettingsPage.avatarUploadHint: Avatar changes are upload-only. The image URL field has been removed.
SettingsPage.name: Space name
SettingsPage.slugHint: Used in the public URL. Letters, numbers and hyphens only.
SettingsPage.bioPlaceholder: Write a short introduction for your story...
SettingsPage.captionStyleHint: Choose the default style for AI-generated captions.
SettingsPage.toneHint: Set the overall tone for AI-generated text.
SettingsPage.blockedPhrasesHint: One phrase per line. AI will try to avoid them.
SettingsPage.blockedPhrasesPlaceholder:
For example: soulmate
meant to be
SettingsPage.memoryPreferenceResetHint: Clear the current style, tone, and blocked phrases so future generations return to the default state.
SettingsPage.memoryPreferenceResetEmptyHint: There are no extra AI memory preferences to clear right now.
SettingsPage.memoryPreferencesResetFailed: Failed to reset AI memory preferences
SettingsPage.visibilityHintOff: Turn on public visibility before sharing the page externally.
SettingsPage.visibilityHintOn: Your public page is ready to preview.
SettingsPage.visibilityDescription: When enabled, anyone with the public link can browse your photos and timeline.
SettingsPage.coverRecentPhotosHint: Quickly choose a space cover from your most recent ready photos.
SettingsPage.coverRecentPhotosEmpty: No photos are ready to use as a cover yet. Upload photos and wait for processing.
